recommendations: GS significantly below SwiGLU family norm (0.28 vs 0.75-0.92). GeGLU family has wide GS range.
β extremely narrow: [0.001, 0.02]. Any β>0.02 causes structural collapse in GeGLU models.
MI acceptable for inference tasks. Phase within family norm.
Not recommended as base model for fine-tuning. Use Qwen or OPT for better structure.
